rationale: Gov't Code §2306.141 governs rulemaking for the housing finance division. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisals and does not implicate housing finance division administration.
quote: The board shall have the specific duty and power to adopt rules governing the administration of the housing finance division and its programs.
_note: No conflict; statutes address distinct subject matters.
